name: Notice of Dissatisfaction and Claim
description: A formal letter expressing dissatisfaction with a provided service and requesting a refund or remedy.
content:
From:
{{customer_name}}
{{customer_address}}
Phone: {{customer_phone}}
Email: {{customer_email}}

Date: {{formatDate letter_date}}

TO:
{{service_provider_name}}
{{service_provider_address}}

RE: Complaint Regarding {{service_name}} Provided on {{service_date}}

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing to formally express my dissatisfaction with the {{service_name}} provided to me by your company on {{service_date}} at {{service_location}}.

Regrettably, the service provided fell significantly short of the promised standards and my reasonable expectations. Specifically, the issues I encountered are as follows:

{{reasons_for_dissatisfaction}}
{{#if attached_evidence}}

Please find attached/linked the supporting evidence (e.g., photos, correspondence) regarding my claim:

{{attached_evidence}}
{{/if}}

Under consumer protection laws, services must be carried out with reasonable care and skill. As this was not the case, I am exercising my legal rights to request the following remedy: {{type_of_claim}}.

Details of my claim:

{{claim_details}}

I request that you review this matter and respond to my claim within {{response_days}} days of receiving this letter. If I do not hear from you within this timeframe, or if we cannot reach a satisfactory resolution, I will have no choice but to escalate the matter to the relevant consumer protection agency or seek legal advice.

I look forward to hearing from you soon to resolve this matter amicably.

Yours faithfully,

_________________________
{{customer_name}}

fields.name: service_name
fields.label: Name/Type of Service Received
fields.placeholder: e.g., Home Renovation, Language Course, Repair Service

fields.name: service_location
fields.label: Location of Service
fields.placeholder: e.g., My home address, Your main office, Online

fields.name: reasons_for_dissatisfaction
fields.label: Reasons for Dissatisfaction (Details)
fields.placeholder: Explain exactly what went wrong and how it failed to meet expectations.

fields.name: attached_evidence
fields.label: Attached Evidence (if any)
fields.placeholder: Mention photos, emails, invoices, or provide links...

fields.name: claim_details
fields.label: Details of Your Claim
fields.placeholder: Be specific. If requesting a refund, state the amount. If requesting a fix, state how.
